isolation.cleanContext: cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, and IndexedDB cleared at start

assertions.title: Returning single profile shows profile row with unlock

steps.action: Created one profile in-session, then navigated to /
steps.expected: Welcome shows returning-user variant for a single profile
steps.observed: Subtitle showed 'Welcome back.' with one profile row

steps.expected: Row includes label, threshold info, truncated group key, and Unlock
steps.observed: Row displayed profile label, '2/3', truncated key, and Unlock status pill

steps.expected: New Keyset and Import action buttons visible
steps.observed: New Keyset and Import Device Profile buttons were visible

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger; observed client-side UI/URL transitions only

assertions.title: Returning many (4+) shows scrollable profile list with overflow indicator

steps.action: Created profiles in-session until 6 total profiles existed, then opened /
steps.expected: Overflow indicator appears and secondary actions remain visible
steps.observed: Indicator text '3 more below' appeared; New Keyset/Import/Onboard remained visible below list

steps.expected: Additional rows become visible after scrolling
steps.observed: Scrolled div.profile-list-scrollable to scrollTop 324; additional lower profile rows became visible

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger; observed client-side UI/URL transitions only

assertions.title: Unlock modal opens, accepts password, successful unlock navigates to Dashboard

steps.action: Click returning profile row on Welcome
steps.expected: Unlock modal opens with title, password input, Unlock, Cancel
steps.observed: Unlock modal opened with Profile Password input and Unlock/Cancel buttons
Input accepted text; get value returned testpass123

steps.expected: Modal closes and app navigates to /dashboard/{profileId}

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger; unlock/navigation appeared client-side

assertions.title: Unlock error shows inline error on wrong password, modal stays open

steps.action: Open Unlock modal and submit wrong password
steps.expected: Inline error appears and modal remains open
steps.observed: Inline error text 'decryption failed' appeared; modal remained open at /
Password field remained interactive and accepted updated input

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger; error handling appeared client-side

assertions.title: Returning multi (2-3 profiles) shows all profile rows with Unlock and Rotate

steps.action: Created additional profiles until 3 total profiles existed, then opened /
steps.expected: Returning multi state with all rows visible without scrolling
steps.observed: Three profile rows were visible simultaneously on Welcome

steps.expected: Each row shows label, threshold, truncated key, Unlock and Rotate
steps.observed: Each row showed 2/3, truncated key, Unlock button, and Rotate button

steps.expected: New Keyset, Import, and Onboard are visible
steps.observed: All three secondary action buttons were visible

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger; observed client-side UI/URL transitions only

assertions.title: Dashboard Lock navigates to Welcome showing returning-user variant with profile list

steps.expected: Navigate to / and show returning-user Welcome with profile list
steps.observed: Redirected to / with 'Welcome back.' and profile row showing Unlock

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger; lock transition appeared client-side

assertions.title: Profile data persists in IndexedDB across page reload

steps.action: After profile creation and lock, hard reload /
steps.observed: Profile row remained visible after reload on /

steps.action: Unlock using original password after reload
steps.expected: Unlock succeeds and navigates to dashboard
steps.observed: Unlock with testpass123 succeeded and navigated to /dashboard/{profileId}

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger; persistence and unlock observed via UI state and URL

frictions.description: During profile-state setup, the Create flow's Distribution Completion screen kept 'Finish Distribution' disabled (0 of 2 remote packages accounted for), preventing dashboard completion via that button.
frictions.resolution: Returned to / directly after /create/complete; created profiles were persisted and usable for returning-user assertions.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests output reported 'No requests captured' for this run.
frictions.resolution: Used URL transitions, DOM state checks, and screenshots as primary behavioral evidence; noted network capture limitation per assertion.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions for welcome returning flows: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
